MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Michael Pitt appeared via zoom for Howell Chan (administrator).

Mr. Pitts stated that his filing of the Inventory and Appraisal got rejected at the clerk's office, and that he will try and refile documents again. Status of closing estate is continued to October 10, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Cecilia Castellanos. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Yang. Not reported.
